prompt: Create a quiet anime-style winter portrait of exactly 1 young woman standing outdoors in a snowy leafless forest. The subject has glossy black shoulder-length straight bob hair with a center part and detailed highlights, wearing exactly 1 oversized pale gray ribbed turtleneck sweater with loose sleeves and fine knit linework. Frame her from mid-torso upward, centered slightly right, facing forward, with her face intentionally hidden by a soft-edged rectangular blur/censor block in muted beige and gray tones. The background is a calm winter park with white snow covering the ground and many evenly spaced bare trees receding in perspective; include long narrow trunks, subtle bark texture, faint shadows on the snow, and cool blue-gray atmospheric haze in the distance. Use clean Japanese anime illustration rendering with delicate ink outlines, soft natural daylight, muted winter colors, realistic fabric folds, and high-detail hair shine. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no animals.
